results.name: Dynamic Model Routing Cascading Survey
results.rationale: Cascading routing in LLM model selection shares the abstract notion of staged routing but has no terraced agriculture/cistern/gravity/per-tree-valve/altitude-gradient/Al-Sanani correspondence.

results.rationale: Unified routing-cascading addresses cost-quality trade-offs, not terraced gravity cascades, cisterns, valves, dry/wet seasonal routing, or altitude-temperature gradients.

results.rationale: Probabilistic cost-aware LLM cascades; no top-tier cistern, K-tier gravity throttling, per-token directional valve, altitude τ_l, or retention regularizer.

decision_rationale: All 8 results target generic LLM-domain cascading/routing/caching/sampling/layerwise topics without the YEMENI-TERRACE composite mechanism. Zero hits. NOTE: primary scored 8 hits at sem 0.74-0.90 / func 0.74-0.90 on Dynamic-Routing + Unified-Cascade + C3PO + OWS adjacencies; verdict-level disagreement flagged (Pattern E).
